# mrclean test fixture — synthetic invalid value for detection pattern testing
# Source: Slack Bot Token format — xoxb- prefix + workspace ID + user ID + token body
# Checksum-flip: last char 'X' instead of valid — pattern matches but token is invalid
# License: test fixture only — not a real credential

SLACK_BOT_TOKEN=xoxb-000000000000-000000000000-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAX
